title: scleria verticillata var. tenella
intro: Scleria verticillata var. tenella, also known as needle sedge, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Scleria verticillata var. tenella include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Scleria verticillata var. tenella can be made from its leaves and stems, which can be dried, powdered, and used as infusions or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
